catalog_content:
Item Name: Konriko Wild Pecan Brown Rice – Nutty Aroma Long-Grain Brown Rice - Wheat-Free, Gluten Free, No MSG 7 oz (Pack of 3)
Bullet Point 1: 𝗔𝗟𝗟-𝗡𝗔𝗧𝗨𝗥𝗔𝗟 𝗔𝗥𝗢𝗠𝗔𝗧𝗜𝗖 𝗥𝗜𝗖𝗘: Enjoy the rare and exclusive long-grain brown rice with a natural nutty aroma. Perfect for elevating everyday meals.
Bullet Point 2: 𝗤𝗨𝗜𝗖𝗞 & 𝗖𝗢𝗡𝗩𝗘𝗡𝗜𝗘𝗡𝗧: Unlike traditional brown rice, this 100% whole grain brown rice cooks in just 20 minutes, saving you time without compromising nutrition.
Bullet Point 3: 𝗛𝗘𝗔𝗟𝗧𝗛𝗬 & 𝗗𝗘𝗟𝗜𝗖𝗜𝗢𝗨𝗦: Packed with the nutritional benefits of brown rice, it’s wheat-free, gluten-free, and contains no MSG—perfect for those with dietary restrictions or seeking a wholesome choice.
Bullet Point 4: 𝗧𝗥𝗨𝗦𝗧𝗘𝗗 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗢𝗩𝗘𝗥 𝟯𝟬 𝗬𝗘𝗔𝗥𝗦: Loved by families for decades, this aromatic brown rice has been a staple for its consistent quality, flavor, and health benefits.
Bullet Point 5: 𝗥𝗘𝗖𝗜𝗣𝗘-𝗥𝗘𝗔𝗗𝗬: Looking for inspiration? Visit our online recipes to discover creative and delicious ways to enjoy this versatile rice in your favorite dishes!
Product Description: An excellent source of rice bran, it's all natural! A rare and exclusive Aromatic Rice with a wonderful nutty aroma and subtle pecan-like flavor (does not actually contain wild rice or pecan pieces). All the nutritional benefits of brown rice and takes only 20 minutes to cook. Take a look at our online recipes!
Value: 21.0
Unit: Ounce
overall_summary: Mid-range specialty rice positioned as a health-conscious, gluten-free, and non-GMO option. The 'nutty aroma' and 'pecan-like flavor' suggest a premium positioning within brown rice, but the packaging and branding do not indicate luxury. The 20-minute cook time and family-oriented messaging suggest affordability and convenience. The 'Pack of 3' bundle deal implies value pricing for bulk purchases.
